typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	var_BCC as string (),
	var_CC as string (),
	var_Dest_Conn as string (),
	var_Dim_Query as string (),
	var_Dw_Run_Cncl_Dt as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Eff_Dt as timestamp (),
	var_Dw_Run_Key as integer (),
	var_Dw_Run_Month as integer (),
	var_Email_From as string (),
	var_Email_Subject as string (),
	var_Email_To as string (),
	var_Error_Description as string (),
	var_Error_Flag as integer (),
	var_Initial_Catalog as string (),
	var_MaxSk as integer (),
	var_SMTP_Server as string ()
}

source(output(
		PSCID as integer,
		PSCTitle as string,
		Measure as string,
		Metric as string,
		PSCKey as string,
		Frequency as string,
		Objective as string,
		Applicability as string,
		Formula as string,
		Reports as string,
		ConfiguredValue as double,
		StandardValue as double,
		Unit as string,
		IsApplicable as string,
		IsApproved as string,
		ApprovalStatus as string,
		DeliveryType as string,
		IsActive as string,
		Operator as string,
		ProjectID as integer,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		LKP_Modified as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        PSCID, PSCTitle, Measure, Metric, PSCKey, Frequency, Objective, Applicability, Formula, Reports, ConfiguredValue, StandardValue, Unit, IsApplicable, IsApproved,                           ApprovalStatus, DeliveryType, IsActive, Operator, ProjectID, DW_Run_Key, DW_Upsert_Flag, Modified AS LKP_Modified FROM            SRC.stg_ProjectSuccessCriteria WHERE        DW_Run_Key = ?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLESRCLOADProjectSuccessCriteria	source(output(
		ProjectSuccessCriteriaSK as integer,
		PSCID as integer,
		PSCTitle as string,
		Measure as string,
		Metric as string,
		PSCKey as string,
		Frequency as string,
		Objective as string,
		Applicability as string,
		Formula as string,
		Reports as string,
		ConfiguredValue as double,
		StandardValue as double,
		Unit as string,
		IsApplicable as string,
		IsApproved as string,
		ApprovalStatus as string,
		DeliveryType as string,
		IsActive as string,
		Operator as string,
		ProjectSK as integer,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp,
		DW_Create_Datetime as timestamp,
		DW_Update_Datetime as timestamp,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		DW_Update_Run_key as integer,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		DW_Current_Flag as integer,
		ProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  *, (SELECT PROJECTID FROM dw.D_Projects WHERE ProjectSK = dw.D_ProjectSuccessCriteria.ProjectSK ) ProjectID  FROM    dw.D_ProjectSuccessCriteria  WHERE	(DW_Current_Flag = 1)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPInWarehouseLKPTABLE	source(output(
		ProjectSK as integer,
		ProjectID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT  ProjectSK, ProjectID  FROM   dw.D_Projects  WHERE DW_Current_Flag = 1',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LKPProjectSKLKPTABLE
OLESRCLOADProjectSuccessCriteria,LKPProjectSKLKPTABLE lookup(OLESRCLOADProjectSuccessCriteria@ProjectID == LKPProjectSKLKPTABLE@ProjectID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPProjectSK
LKPProjectSK select(mapColumn(
		PSCID = PSCID,
		PSCTitle = PSCTitle,
		Measure = Measure,
		Metric = Metric,
		PSCKey = PSCKey,
		Frequency = Frequency,
		Objective = Objective,
		Applicability = Applicability,
		Formula = Formula,
		Reports = Reports,
		ConfiguredValue = ConfiguredValue,
		StandardValue = StandardValue,
		Unit = Unit,
		IsApplicable = IsApplicable,
		IsApproved = IsApproved,
		ApprovalStatus = ApprovalStatus,
		DeliveryType = DeliveryType,
		IsActive = IsActive,
		Operator = Operator,
		ProjectID = OLESRCLOADProjectSuccessCriteria@ProjectID,
		DW_Run_Key = DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = DW_Upsert_Flag,
		LKP_Modified = LKP_Modified,
		ProjectSK = ProjectSK
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPProjectSKSelect
LKPProjectSKSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPProjectSKIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match derive(DW_Effective_End_Date = toTimestamp(toString(('9999-12-31 00:00:00.000'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'),
		var_begin_date = toTimestamp(toString(iif(DW_Run_Key < $User__var_Dw_Run_Key, $User__var_Dw_Run_Eff_Dt, toString(LKP_Modified)), 'MM/dd/yyyy'), 'MM/dd/yyyy'),
		var_Curr_Flag = 1,
		var_Update_Run_key = $User__var_Dw_Run_Key,
		var_DW_Run_Key = toInteger(iif(DW_Run_Key < $User__var_Dw_Run_Key, $User__var_Dw_Run_Key, toString(DW_Run_Key))),
		var_Project_SK = iif(isNull(ProjectSK), -(3), ProjectSK)) ~> DLTValues
DLTValues,LKPInWarehouseLKPTABLE lookup(LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@PSCID == LKPInWarehouseLKPTABLE@PSCID && LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@ProjectID == LKPInWarehouseLKPTABLE@ProjectID,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LKPInWarehouse
LKPInWarehouse select(mapColumn(
		DW_Effective_End_Date = DLTValues@DW_Effective_End_Date,
		var_begin_date = var_begin_date,
		var_Curr_Flag = var_Curr_Flag,
		var_Update_Run_key = var_Update_Run_key,
		var_DW_Run_Key = var_DW_Run_Key,
		var_Project_SK = var_Project_SK,
		ProjectSK = DLTValues@ProjectSK,
		PSCID = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@PSCID,
		PSCTitle = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@PSCTitle,
		Measure = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@Measure,
		Metric = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@Metric,
		PSCKey = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@PSCKey,
		Frequency = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@Frequency,
		Objective = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@Objective,
		Applicability = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@Applicability,
		Formula = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@Formula,
		Reports = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@Reports,
		ConfiguredValue = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@ConfiguredValue,
		StandardValue = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@StandardValue,
		Unit = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@Unit,
		IsApplicable = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@IsApplicable,
		IsApproved = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@IsApproved,
		ApprovalStatus = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@ApprovalStatus,
		DeliveryType = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@DeliveryType,
		IsActive = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@IsActive,
		Operator = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@Operator,
		ProjectID = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@ProjectID,
		DW_Run_Key = DLTValues@DW_Run_Key,
		DW_Upsert_Flag = LKPProjectSKIsMatch@Match@DW_Upsert_Flag,
		LKP_Modified = LKP_Modified,
		{} = {},
		ProjectSuccessCriteriaSK = ProjectSuccessCriteriaSK,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date = DW_Effective_Begin_Date,
		DW_Create_Datetime = DW_Create_Datetime,
		DW_Update_Datetime = DW_Update_Datetime,
		DW_Update_Run_key = DW_Update_Run_key,
		DW_Current_Flag = DW_Current_Flag
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> LKPInWarehouseSelect
LKPInWarehouseSelect split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LKPInWarehouseIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LKPInWarehouseIsMatch@Match split(PSCID != PSCID || PSCTitle != PSCTitle || trim(Measure) != trim(Measure) || trim(Metric) != trim(Metric) || trim(PSCKey) != trim(PSCKey) || trim(Frequency) != trim(Frequency) || trim(Objective) != trim(Objective) || trim(Applicability) != trim(Applicability) || trim(Formula) != trim(Formula) || trim(Reports) != trim(Reports) || ConfiguredValue != ConfiguredValue || StandardValue != StandardValue || trim(Unit) != trim(Unit) || trim(IsApplicable) != trim(IsApplicable) || trim(IsApproved) != trim(IsApproved) || trim(ApprovalStatus) != trim(ApprovalStatus) || trim(DeliveryType) != trim(DeliveryType) || trim(IsActive) != trim(IsActive) || trim(Operator) != trim(Operator) || ProjectID != ProjectID, disjoint: true) ~> ConditionalSplit@(UpdateDProjectSuccessCriteria,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
ConditionalSplit@ConditionalSplitTOConditionalSplitREFORMATDATATYPEDIFFLINK derive({} = toString({})) ~> ConditionalSplitREFORMATDATATYPEDIFF
ConditionalSplitREFORMATDATATYPEDIFF,LKPInWarehouseIsMatch@NotMatch union(byName: true) ~> Allcombineinsertandupdate
ConditionalSplit@UpdateDProjectSuccessCriteria sink(input(
		{} as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy'
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> OLEDBCommand
Allcombineinsertandupdate sink(input(
		Operator as string,
		ConfiguredValue as double,
		DW_Effective_End_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		StandardValue as double,
		IsActive as string,
		DW_Upsert_Flag as string,
		Unit as string,
		DW_Run_Key as integer,
		ProjectSK as integer,
		ApprovalStatus as string,
		IsApproved as string,
		Formula as string,
		DW_Current_Flag as integer,
		Measure as string,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		DeliveryType as string,
		IsApplicable as string,
		Reports as string,
		PSCKey as string,
		PSCTitle as string,
		Objective as string,
		PSCID as integer,
		Frequency as string,
		DW_Update_Run_key as integer,
		Metric as string,
		Applicability as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Operator,
		ConfiguredValue,
		DW_Effective_End_Date,
		StandardValue,
		IsActive,
		DW_Upsert_Flag,
		Unit,
		DW_Run_Key,
		ProjectSK = var_Project_SK,
		ApprovalStatus,
		IsApproved,
		Formula,
		DW_Current_Flag = var_Curr_Flag,
		Measure,
		DW_Effective_Begin_Date = var_begin_date,
		DeliveryType,
		IsApplicable,
		Reports,
		PSCKey,
		PSCTitle,
		Objective,
		PSCID,
		Frequency,
		DW_Update_Run_key = var_Update_Run_key,
		Metric,
		Applicability)) ~> OLEDBDestination
